name: Playdough
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together salt, flour, and cream tartar.
2. Add water and oil and mix well.
3. Cook on high heat until the mixture begins to thicken and forms a ball at the bottom of the pan.
4. Turn down the heat once it starts to stick together.
5. Remove from heat and knead in coloring on a counter or cutting board. Do not try to remove all lumps as they will blend as used.
6. Store in an airtight container.
